name: (Set of 2) 24" x 30" Textured Fabric Framed Wall Art - Threshold™
description:
Refresh your living space with the (Set of 2) 24" x 30" Textured Fabric Framed Wall Art from Threshold™. These pieces of art can be hung on an empty patch of wall to decorate the space. They feature textured fabric designs in a brown shade that can fit into most decor styles. This pair of framed textured wall art also makes for a great housewarming gift.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
